name: geekjair--codex-cleaner
description: Monitor and clean invalid codex auth files from CPA (Codex Provider Agent). Checks quota status, disables 401 files, double-verifies before deletion. Use when user mentions "codex clean", "clean auth", "auth files", "CPA清理", "codex 认证", "清理无效文件", or needs to manage codex authentication files.
